title: teucrium polium subsp. rouyanum
intro: Teucrium polium subsp. rouyanum, also known as Rouyan's germander, is a subspecies of the germander plant (Teucrium polium) native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Teucrium polium subsp. rouyanum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health, among others. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
